title: Local Storage Notes

statement.markdown: Create a note-taking application that stores notes in local storage. The application should display a list of notes with an edit button. When a user clicks the edit button, the corresponding note's title and content should be displayed in a modal window. The user should be able to edit the note's title and content, and then save the changes.

constraints: All functionality should be implemented in JavaScript.
Use HTML for structure and CSS for styling.
Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling.
